experimental_design: Cells treated with DMSO (control cells) were adapted to ‘heavy’ SILAC media whereas the cells grown in ‘regular’ media were treated with curcumin for 4 h.
factor_value: Cells treated with DMSO (control cells) were adapted to ‘heavy’ SILAC media whereas the cells grown in ‘regular’ media were treated with curcumin for 4 h.
